AIDemo.title: AI Capabilities Demo
AIDemo.description: This page showcases non-public features and is exclusively for users who have purchased the template. It's designed for learning and testing the AI model invocation process. To use it, simply launch the template locally and input your API key in the environment variables. The AI demo includes functionalities like single-turn and multi-turn conversations, text-to-image, image-to-image, and text/image-to-video conversions. Through this demo, you can quickly grasp the AI invocation workflow, accelerating your journey in building AI applications.
AIDemo.metaDescription: This page showcases AI capabilities including single-turn and multi-turn conversations, text-to-image, image-to-image, and text/image-to-video conversions.

DevToolKit.hero_description: Free online developer tools for encoding, formatting, generating, converting, and more. No ads, fast, and privacy-first.
DevToolKit.no_favorites: No favorites yet. Star your frequently used tools!

base64.description: Encode and decode Base64 strings and files

jwt-decoder.description: Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens

json-formatter.name: JSON Formatter & Validator
json-formatter.description: Format, minify, and validate JSON data

uuid-generator.name: UUID Generator
uuid-generator.description: Generate UUID v4 and v7 identifiers

hash-generator.name: Hash Generator
hash-generator.description: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512 hashes

timestamp-converter.name: Timestamp Converter
timestamp-converter.description: Convert between Unix timestamps and dates

color-converter.name: Color Converter
color-converter.description: Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL color formats

number-base.name: Number Base Converter
number-base.description: Convert between binary, octal, decimal, hex

unit-converter.name: CSS Unit Converter
unit-converter.description: Convert between px, rem, em, vw units

regex-tester.name: Regex Tester
regex-tester.description: Test regular expressions with real-time matching
